reasoning: The stock market movement over a single week is notoriously difficult to predict and normally sits close to a 52-54% baseline due to general market drift. The statistical trend analysis gives a combined 57% chance of an upward move based partly on historical seasonality, but recent price action over the last week has been strongly negative (dropping from nearly 208 to under 190). There are no publicly apparent major anticipated game releases or earnings reports happening strictly within this one-week window (GTA 6 was delayed to November 2026). Following the instructions to stay close to 0.5 unless the data shows a very strong signal, I forecast a 52% probability, leaning slightly toward a positive week but closely honoring the baseline uncertainty.
